generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a taxpayer, I've always believed in supporting our alliances. But have you seen what's happening? Our partners aren't pulling their weight, and our own preparedness is suffering. We can't afford to be the world's policeman while others take advantage. It's time to demand real burden-sharing or reconsider commitments that leave us vulnerable. #NationalSecurityFirst #AllianceAccountability
